aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Driven but reactive

💼 Career: Tum aggressively kaam push karoge, par resistance milega

❤️ Love: Ego clashes ho sakte hain

💰 Money: Risky step avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Control reaction, not ambition

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum jeetne ke chakkar me situation bigaad dete ho
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Steady confidence

💼 Career: Tumhara patience reward dene lagega

❤️ Love: Stable aur secure feel hoga

💰 Money: Smart saving beneficial rahegi

🧘 Advice: Apni consistency maintain rakho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum slow ho, par long-term winner ho

♊ Gemini

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum sunte sab ho, samajhte half ho
